check: All interactive elements have hover states and cursor-pointer
why_it_matters: Users need visual feedback on clickable elements

check: Focus states are visible and consistent across all components
why_it_matters: Keyboard navigation requires clear focus indicators

check: No emojis used as icons — only SVG or icon font icons
why_it_matters: Emojis render inconsistently across OS and look unprofessional

check: Text contrast meets 4.5:1 minimum in light mode
why_it_matters: WCAG AA compliance and readability

check: prefers-reduced-motion is respected for all animations
why_it_matters: Accessibility for users with vestibular disorders

check: Responsive breakpoints tested: 375px 768px 1024px 1440px
why_it_matters: Mobile tablet desktop large desktop coverage

check: Loading states present for all async operations
why_it_matters: Users need feedback during data fetching

check: Empty states designed for every list table grid
why_it_matters: Empty data should not look broken

check: Error states with helpful messages and recovery actions
why_it_matters: Users need guidance when things go wrong

check: Browser back button works correctly for filter sort page state
why_it_matters: Expected browser behavior must be preserved

check: No console errors or warnings in production build
why_it_matters: Clean console indicates code quality

check: All images have alt text or aria-hidden if decorative
why_it_matters: Screen reader compatibility

check: Tab order follows logical reading order
why_it_matters: Keyboard navigation must be intuitive

check: No inline styles on generic UI primitives
why_it_matters: Maintainability and theme consistency

check: Form inputs have associated labels and error links
why_it_matters: Accessibility and validation clarity

check: Table row actions are keyboard accessible
why_it_matters: All users must access actions without mouse

check: Pagination updates URL query params
why_it_matters: Shareable and bookmarkable page states

check: Search debounce is 300-500ms not instant
why_it_matters: Prevents API flooding and improves UX

check: Bulk actions disabled when no rows selected
why_it_matters: Prevents invalid operations

check: Dirty form confirmation before route leave
why_it_matters: Prevents accidental data loss

check: Submit button disabled while invalid
why_it_matters: Prevents invalid submissions

check: Form sections collapse gracefully on mobile
why_it_matters: Mobile form UX must be usable

check: Skeleton screens used instead of spinners for initial load
why_it_matters: Reduces layout shift improves perceived performance

check: Charts have loading and empty states
why_it_matters: Data visualization must handle all states

check: Auto-refresh interval is reasonable not excessive
why_it_matters: Prevents server overload

check: Back navigation returns to correct list state
why_it_matters: User expects to return to same context

check: Related data lazy-loaded not blocking initial render
why_it_matters: Improves initial page load speed

check: Each section saves independently or global save is explicit
why_it_matters: Prevents accidental partial saves

check: Toggle switches have immediate feedback with undo capability
why_it_matters: Users need confirmation for state changes

check: Step validation prevents forward navigation when invalid
why_it_matters: Wizard must enforce data quality per step

check: Progress indicator shows current step and total steps
why_it_matters: Users need orientation in multi-step flows

check: Summary review step before final submit
why_it_matters: Prevents accidental submissions

check: Password visibility toggle present
why_it_matters: Improves UX for password entry

check: Form focuses first input on load
why_it_matters: Small UX improvement for keyboard users

check: Social login buttons match brand colors
why_it_matters: Visual consistency with external services

check: All new imports resolve to installed packages
why_it_matters: Missing packages break builds and CI

check: No unused imports or dead dependencies
why_it_matters: Bloats bundle and confuses developers

check: Package manager lockfile is in sync with package.json
why_it_matters: Prevents inconsistent installs across environments

check: All translation keys exist in every locale file
why_it_matters: Missing keys show raw text to users

check: No hardcoded user-facing strings outside t() calls
why_it_matters: Breaks multi-language support

check: New translation keys added to all messages files before commit
why_it_matters: Prevents incomplete translations
